overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval Gothic common room interior from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring stone arches, warm firelight from a large hearth, and wizard characters in robes walking through the underground space.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval common room with central seating and fireplace

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the common room from a fixed elevated vantage point near the fireplace

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from right to left across the room at moderate pace
student in light blue robes entering from right and standing near the fireplace

entered.detail: large pointed stone archway forming the main entrance to the chamber
large stone fireplace with active flames providing warm illumination
circular wooden table with books and items scattered on surface
upholstered armchairs arranged around the central table
upper level balcony with stone railing overlooking the common room
medieval-style wall-mounted lamps providing ambient lighting
potted plants suspended from the ceiling and balcony

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cozy underground common room with Gothic stone architecture and warm firelight. The camera observes from a fixed position as students in wizard robes periodically walk through the space, with one character pausing near the fireplace on the right. The room features a central seating area with a round table, a large stone archway in the background, and a balcony level to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a cozy underground common room where the stillness of Gothic architecture is punctuated by the rhythmic movement of students. It begins with a wide view of the stone-walled interior, capturing the warm glow of firelight that illuminates a central seating area and a round table. As the camera lingers, wizarding students in robes drift through the space, with one character pausing momentarily beside the large hearth on the right. The perspective then encompasses the depth of the room, drawing the eye from the foreground activity toward a massive stone archway in the background and a quiet balcony level to the left.
